content: Two papers accepted by IEEE ICASSP 2024.
I'll be joining in Daniel Povey's group @ Xiaomi as an intern working on the Next-gen Kaldi Project.
One paper accepted by IEEE/ACM TASLP.
Two papers accepted by IEEE ICASSP 2023.
I passed my Ph.D. Thesis Proposal Defense.
Joined Prof. Xunying Liu's lab as a research postgraduate student.
